items.title: Personalized Home Quality Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve Spotify's first-session impression by tightening home ranking quality, cross-format recirculation, and faster play starts.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase deliberate listening by improving discovery confidence earlier in the session.
Increase the share of home opens that turn into immediate plays.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve perceived product value for free and paid listeners.

productBricks.change: Improve ranking orchestration and session-context handling.
Improve recommendation freshness and cross-format candidate selection.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated home feed treatments to iOS.
Release updated home feed treatments to Android.

items.title: Premium Value Clarity Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve entitlement clarity, plan comparison, and purchase reliability around Spotify Premium plans.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase plan adoption by making Premium value and plan fit easier to understand.
Reduce plan-related churn caused by entitlement and billing confusion.

productBricks.change: Improve plan comparison, upsell timing, and lifecycle messaging.
Improve subscription billing visibility and failure recovery.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated plan selection and account flows.

items.title: Artist Fan Conversion Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve release readiness, targeting, and fan-conversion feedback for artist and label teams.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase post-campaign listening conversion for targeted fans.
Reduce preventable launch friction and metadata delays.

businessKPIs.kpi: Artist team monthly active campaign rate
businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase recurring usage of artist growth tooling.

productBricks.change: Improve launch readiness checks and launch-state guidance.
Improve listener targeting and campaign creation flow.
Improve fan-source reporting and release conversion views.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated Spotify for Artists campaign flow.

items.title: Creator Monetization Confidence Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve creator earnings transparency, monetizable inventory growth, and advertiser outcome reporting.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the amount of creator inventory eligible for monetization.
Increase creator trust in the platform's earnings model.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase creator participation in platform-native monetization.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of ad spend with trusted outcome reporting.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase advertiser confidence and repeat spend.

productBricks.change: Improve creator earnings explanation and onboarding.
Improve creator funnel and revenue reporting.

deliveryChannels.change: Release updated creator monetization and reporting surfaces.
Release stronger reporting outputs for partner integrations.
